info.name: EASB - Jalan Saluran SMKK Module API
info.description: API collection for Jalan Saluran SMKK Module - managing SMKK (Standar Mutu Konstruksi dan Keamanan) data for jalan and saluran projects. SMKK contains safety equipment and materials pricing information linked to ruang lingkup (scope of work).

variable.description: Base URL for the API server
JWT access token obtained from login
API prefix (api/dev/v1 for development, api/v1 for production)

item.name: Jalan Saluran SMKK Management (ADMIN, SUPERADMIN)

request.description:
Create a new Jalan Saluran SMKK entry. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Fields:**
- `id_ruang_lingkup` (number, required): ID of the ruang lingkup (scope of work)
- `no_mata_pembayaran` (string, required): Payment code/number
- `satuan` (string, required): Unit of measurement (e.g., Buah, Pasang, etc.)
- `harga_satuan` (number, optional): Unit price (can be null or 0)
- `uraian` (string, required): Description of the SMKK item
- `pengali` (number, required): Multiplier factor for cost calculation

**Note:** The combination of `id_ruang_lingkup`, `no_mata_pembayaran`, and `uraian` must be unique.

Update an existing Jalan Saluran SMKK entry. All fields except `id` are optional. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Fields:**
- `id` (number, required): ID of the SMKK entry to update
- `id_ruang_lingkup` (number, optional): New ruang lingkup ID
- `no_mata_pembayaran` (string, optional): New payment code
- `satuan` (string, optional): New unit of measurement
- `harga_satuan` (number, optional): New unit price (can be null or 0)
- `uraian` (string, optional): New description
- `pengali` (number, optional): New multiplier factor

variable.description: ID of the SMKK entry to delete

request.description:
Delete a Jalan Saluran SMKK entry by ID. Requires ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role.

**Path Parameters:**
- `id` (number, required): ID of the SMKK entry to delete

item.description: Management operations for Jalan Saluran SMKK - All endpoints require ADMIN or SUPERADMIN role

item.name: Jalan Saluran SMKK Queries

request.description:
Get paginated list of all Jalan Saluran SMKK entries. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Query Parameters:**
- `page` (number, optional): Page number
- `amount` (number, optional): Items per page

**Response includes:**
- `data`: Array of SMKK objects with related ruang lingkup information
- Pagination metadata (total, page, limit, totalPages)

item.name: Get Jalan Saluran SMKK By ID

request.description:
Get detailed information for a specific Jalan Saluran SMKK entry by ID. Requires OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role.

**Path Parameters:**
- `id` (number, required): ID of the SMKK entry

**Returns:** Complete SMKK object with all fields including related ruang lingkup information

item.description: Query endpoints for retrieving Jalan Saluran SMKK information - All require OPD, VERIFIKATOR, ADMIN, or SUPERADMIN role
